infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wugi uses your location to show nearby venues and events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wugi uses your camera to upload photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Wugi needs access to your photos to upload images.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wugi uses your microphone for video recording.

ios.extraPodfileContent:
post_integrate do |installer|
  installer.pods_project.targets.each do |target|
    target.build_configurations.each do |config|
      config.build_settings['CLANG_ALLOW_NON_MODULAR_INCLUDES_IN_FRAMEWORK_MODULES'] = 'YES'
      if target.name == 'stripe-react-native'
        rn_path = File.join(File.dirname(__FILE__), '..', 'node_modules', 'react-native')
        existing = config.build_settings['HEADER_SEARCH_PATHS'] || ['$(inherited)']
        existing = [existing] if existing.is_a?(String)
        config.build_settings['HEADER_SEARCH_PATHS'] = existing + [
          File.join(rn_path, 'ReactCommon'),
          File.join(rn_path, 'ReactCommon', 'react', 'utils', 'platform', 'ios'),
          File.join(rn_path, 'React')
        ]
      end
    end
  end
end
